records.ety: [L. protoplastus the first man, Gr. <?/ formed or created first; <?/ first + <?/ formed, fr. <?/ to form.]

defs: The thing first formed; that of which there are subsequent copies or reproductions; the original.
A first-formed organized body; the first individual, or pair of individuals, of a species.
quotes: A species is a class of individuals, each of which is hypothetically considered to be the descendant of the same protoplast, or of the same pair of protoplasts.
